rationale: The response explicitly brakes the requested N+1 channel by rejecting a permanent transfer channel, names the prior repeated splits (加急池、补件队列、主管线) plus the new proposed 转派通道, and moves upstream to the shared routing/ownership/intake failure. It proposes consolidation into unified exception routing rules with owners, escalation conditions, return paths, and closure standards. The temporary emergency口 is bounded and framed as non-permanent stopgap, so it does not trigger the fail signal.
